reasoning: Zootopia 2 releases on Wednesday, November 26, 2025. Wednesday releases historically lower the 3-day (Friday–Sunday) weekend box office, as opening demand is spread out over five days. Current estimated 5-day tracking for the film is around $140M–$160M, which would imply a 3-day total of approximately $95M–$115M. Furthermore, it faces immense competition from blockbusters with standard Friday releases. "The Fantastic Four: First Steps" has already grossed $117M over its 3-day opening, "Wicked: For Good" is tracking for $155M+, and "Avatar: Fire and Ash" is expected to be a massive juggernaut. It is highly improbable that a Wednesday release will surpass all Friday-release mega-blockbusters on a pure 3-day timeline.
batch_queries: Will 'Zootopia 2' have the best domestic opening weekend in 2025?
